Hamar kommune - Forsiden

https://www.hamar.kommune.no/
Avvik: 117 | Bestått: 777
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg fill="currentColor" id="logo_hamarkommune_1" viewbox="0 0 937.92 291.55" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path d="m86.34,30.92h-.01s2.92,6.25,2.92,6.25l5.22,11.2c15.52-7.25,32.92-11.31,51.31-
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 property="headline">Søk barnehageplass innen 1. mars</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="global-header__nav"> <div class="container-lg"> <ul class="global-menu list-unstyled" data-globalheader-target="menu" id="global-menu-navigation"> <li class="global-menu__item theme-school
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="tile-common standard-menu d-print-none col-12 col-lg-4 single-mode"> <div class="tile-content"> <h2><span>Snarveier</span></h2> <ul class="treelist nav"><li class="nav-item first tree-leve
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (109 avvik)

MINOR

Lokale forskrifter og retningslinjer for byggesaker - Hamar kommune

https://www.hamar.kommune.no/byggesak/lokale-forskrifter-og-retningslinjer-for-byggesaker/
Avvik: 157 | Bestått: 827
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (6 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (5 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2><span>Lenker</span></h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'answer' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input data-placeholder="Beskriv feilen eller det du savner på denne siden:" id="feedback-radio-yes-ctwebform-template-5" name="answer" type="radio" value="yes"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

<svg class="VIpgJd-yAWNEb-hvhgNd-THI6Vb NMm5M" focusable="false" height="24" viewbox="0 0 24 24" width="24"><path d="M3 17h6.31l-.95 4.57-.03.32c0 .41.17.79.44 1.06L9.83 24s7.09-6.85 7.17-7V4H6c-.83 0
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg class="VIpgJd-ZVi9od-aZ2wEe" height="96px" viewbox="0 0 66 66" width="96px" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle class="VIpgJd-ZVi9od-aZ2wEe-Jt5cK" cx="33" cy="33" fill="none" r="30" stroke
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (102 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til forsiden'

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'answer' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input data-placeholder="Beskriv feilen eller det du savner på denne siden:" id="feedback-radio-yes-ctwebform-template-5" name="answer" type="radio" value="yes"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<svg class="VIpgJd-yAWNEb-hvhgNd-THI6Vb NMm5M" focusable="false" height="24" viewbox="0 0 24 24" width="24"><path d="M3 17h6.31l-.95 4.57-.03.32c0 .41.17.79.44 1.06L9.83 24s7.09-6.85 7.17-7V4H6c-.83 0
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg class="VIpgJd-ZVi9od-aZ2wEe" height="96px" viewbox="0 0 66 66" width="96px" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle class="VIpgJd-ZVi9od-aZ2wEe-Jt5cK" cx="33" cy="33" fill="none" r="30" stroke
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (5 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2><span>Kontaktinformasjon</span></h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'answer' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input data-placeholder="Beskriv feilen eller det du savner på denne siden:" id="feedback-radio-yes-ctwebform-template-5" name="answer" type="radio" value="yes"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (5 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til Facebook'

Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link

MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til Youtube'

<a class="youtube_link" href="https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCw7dmjYMidZ4hqZqlzPlN5A"> <span class="sr-only">Gå til Youtube</span> <i aria-hidden="true" class="icon zmdi zmdi-youtube"></i> </a>

<a class="linkedin_link" href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/2026480/"> <span class="sr-only">Gå til LinkedIn</span> <i aria-hidden="true" class="icon zmdi zmdi-linkedin"></i> </a>

MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til Instagram'

<a class="instagram_link" href="https://www.instagram.com/hamar_kommune/"> <span class="sr-only">Gå til Instagram</span> <i aria-hidden="true" class="icon zmdi zmdi-instagram"></i> </a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (5 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input id="goog-gt-votingInputSrcLang" name="sl" type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

First heading is h2, should start with h1

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a class="print_link" href="#" onclick="print(); return false;"> <span class="sr-only">Skriv ut</span> <i aria-hidden="true" class="icon zmdi zmdi-print"></i> </a>
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til parkeringskart som viser kommunale plasser'

<a class="btn btn-primary" href="https://hamar-kom.maps.arcgis.com/apps/instant/media/index.html?appid=2e3b78391deb4321801a451875965955">Gå til parkeringskart som viser kommunale plasser</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://hamar-kom.maps.arcgis.com/apps/instant/media/index.html?appid=2e3b78391deb4321801a451875965955" rel="noreferrer noopener" target="_blank">Se parkeringskart</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)

4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (3 avvik)

SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-W2HRRX" style="display:none; visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="60" id="ctstatistics-noscript-iframe" src="https://www.hamar.kommune.no/regstat.php/2026-02-09/?l=no_NO&i=1&h=www.hamar.kommune.no&q=200&n=html&o=41713-33271&m=
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe frameborder="0" name="votingFrame"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

Testreglene er basert på UU-tilsynets offisielle testregler

🔄 Start ny skanning

https://www.hamar.kommune.no/
1-500

Kopier kommandoen:

python checker.py https://www.hamar.kommune.no/ --max-pages 16 --format html
